name: todo-as
description: Example Qorvum smart contract written in AssemblyScript

scripts.asbuild:debug: asc assembly/index.ts --outFile build/debug.wasm   --textFile build/debug.wat   --runtime stub --path node_modules --debug
scripts.asbuild:release: asc assembly/index.ts --outFile build/release.wasm --textFile build/release.wat --runtime stub --path node_modules --optimizeLevel 3
